---
title: "Personal"
title-block-banner: false
---

My greatest passion is the *Carnival of Cádiz*, a mixture of different arts with a deep concern for social problems and popular beauty. Every February, numerous groups share musical theatres ranging from the poetic to the comical.

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pm79P9BHtco start="372" >}}

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k7xzazEcMT4 start="421" >}}
